name: Dolma Ici Zeytinyagli (Rice Stuffing for Vegetables)
recipeInstructions:
This stuffing is for eggplants, peppers, tomatoes, and zucchini. It is made with olive oil and served as a cold vegetable dish.
1. Slice onion very finely.
2. Skin and roughly chop tomato.
3. Wash rice until the water runs clear.
4. Heat olive oil in a deep pot.
5. Fry onion until it becomes soft.
6. Add chopped tomato, pine nuts, currants, sugar, thyme, salt, and pepper.
7. Stir in drained rice and fry together for two or three minutes.
8. Cover with just enough water to come half an inch above the level of the rice.
9. Boil out the water and steam until the rice mixture is dry.
10. Allow to cool.
11. Stuff vegetables with the mixture.
12. Arrange in a flat roasting pan, covering each one after scooping out the inside and sprinkling with salt.
13. Pour around them enough water to come half-way up their sides.
14. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until well cooked through and soft but not losing shape.
15. Sprinkle with chopped dill and parsley.
